task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

client_onboarding_email_draft.txt

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to Project Helios – Meridian Group Integration Onboarding

Dear Priya,

On behalf of the entire NovaBridge team, I am thrilled to officially welcome you and Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. We know how critical reliable, live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT are to your IT strategy, and we are confident that Helios will provide your team with the visibility, control, and performance you require from day one.

As discussed, Project Helios is designed to seamlessly ingest data from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean, actionable data to your reporting platforms via our secure APIs and webhooks. 

To ensure a seamless onboarding experience, we will be sending your secure access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. 

In the meantime, to keep our integration on track, here is an outline of our immediate next steps:
1. IT Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram to facilitate the integration environment setup (target: July 12, 2026).
2. UAT Provisioning: Your team will provision UAT environment access (target: July 19, 2026).
3. Stakeholder Demo: We will work collaboratively to resolve any remaining setup items prior to the stakeholder demonstration scheduled for July 25, 2026.

As your Project Manager, I will be your primary point of contact for project coordination and scheduling, and can be reached directly at s.chen@novabridge.com. For any technical inquiries, our Technical Lead, Derek Okafor, is available at d.okafor@novabridge.com. We are both here to support you at every step of the integration.

Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any immediate questions. We are very much looking forward to a successful partnership with you and the broader Meridian IT team.

Best regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have located the email draft (`client_onboarding_email_draft.txt`), reviewed it, and updated it. I've enhanced the tone to be more professional, welcoming, and directly tailored to Priya (the IT lead) and Meridian Group’s strategic goals. The next steps and deadlines are clearly laid out, and the updated draft has been saved back to the same file in your sandbox. 

Here is the finalized version that was saved:

**To:** Priya Kapoor
**Subject:** Welcome to Project Helios – Meridian Group Integration Onboarding

**Dear Priya,**

On behalf of the entire NovaBridge team, I am thrilled to officially welcome you and Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. We know how critical reliable, live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT are to your IT strategy, and we are confident that Helios will provide your team with the visibility, control, and performance you require from day one.

As discussed, Project Helios is designed to seamlessly ingest data from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean, actionable data to your reporting platforms via our secure APIs and webhooks. 

To ensure a seamless onboarding experience, we will be sending your secure access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. 

In the meantime, to keep our integration on track, here is an outline of our immediate next steps:
1. **IT Infrastructure Diagram:** Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram to facilitate the integration environment setup (target: July 12, 2026).
2. **UAT Provisioning:** Your team will provision UAT environment access (target: July 19, 2026).
3. **Stakeholder Demo:** We will work collaboratively to resolve any remaining setup items prior to the stakeholder demonstration scheduled for July 25, 2026.

As your Project Manager, I will be your primary point of contact for project coordination and scheduling, and can be reached directly at s.chen@novabridge.com. For any technical inquiries, our Technical Lead, Derek Okafor, is available at d.okafor@novabridge.com. We are both here to support you at every step of the integration.

Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any immediate questions. We are very much looking forward to a successful partnership with you and the broader Meridian IT team.

**Best regards,**

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com
